definition: Formula-level expression for the quenching side of sakkāya understood through the five clung-to heaps.
notes: Use this phrase when the text explicitly treats appropriated identity in terms of nirodha. The formula inherits the technical sakkāya default identity and the repository's governed nirodha preference for quenching. Do not flatten the line into destruction-of-self rhetoric.

context_rules.context: In direct doctrinal translation of the formula
In explanatory prose where a fuller phrase is needed
context_rules.notes: Use this as a controlled alternate for clarification.

example_phrases.notes: Formula line tied to the five clung-to heaps by the governing sakkāya entry.
